header.title: Frequently Asked

v2.title: Everything You Need to Know to
v2.subtitle: We're also ready to help discuss your achievement plans in depth.

items.a1: More than a tutoring institution, Cogito Academy is a talent incubator with a mission to shape world-class scholar-champions. Founded on the simple principle that to be the best, one must learn directly from the best. Cogito Academy aims to systematically transform student potential into measurable achievement through proven training methods on the global stage.
items.q2: What sets Cogito Academy apart from other tutoring centers?
items.a2Title: Cogito Academy's excellence is built on three main pillars:
items.a2p1: Our tutors are not just teachers, but competition champions and practitioners with diverse real-world experience, from national olympiad winners to legal practitioners who have worked at the United Nations. They train students with deep field understanding, beyond just theory.
items.a2p2: Our curriculum is specially designed by champion tutors and curriculum specialists to build winner abilities and mentality in students. Our methodology covers preparation before, during, and after learning sessions to ensure maximum material mastery.
items.a2p3: Class sizes are limited to ensure each individual gets adequate attention from tutors. Students routinely receive detailed feedback, and parents receive progress reports from Cogito Academy to monitor their child's development.
items.a3Title: Cogito Academy offers three types of class programs that can be tailored to needs:
items.a3p1: Structured courses with a holistic curriculum from introduction to skill refinement. Programs offered include World Scholar's Cup (36 sessions), Model United Nations (24 sessions), and Debate (18 sessions).
items.a3p2: On-demand preparation programs specifically designed for one particular competition. Available topics include Speech, Scientific Writing & Essays, Business Plans, Olympiads, and many more.
items.a3p3: Regular training programs designed specifically based on a school's needs.
items.q4: How does the learning cycle work at Cogito Academy?
items.a4Title: Our learning cycle is designed for maximum material mastery and divided into several stages:
items.a4p1: Students receive materials such as case studies or journal articles to analyze first. This ensures face-to-face sessions can focus on strategic discussions, not just basic theory.
items.a4p2: Class sessions focus on practical application through simulations, role-playing, and pressure-testing. In this stage, tutors act as sparring partners for students.
items.a4p3: After sessions end, students complete application tasks like writing position papers or resolution drafts. This exercise aims to internalize skills contextually.
items.a4p4: Detailed feedback is provided for each task completed by students. Additionally, regular consultation sessions with parents are conducted to monitor student progress.
items.q5: What are the prices and course fee schemes?
items.a5p1: Due to Cogito Academy's personalized class scheme based on each student or group's needs, class package prices vary considering competition type, number of classes in the package, and number of students participating in one class.
items.a5p2: We implement a flexible payment system where parents and/or schools can choose to pay in full upfront or in installments up to three times without additional fees.
